name: Artificer Initiate
description: You learn one cantrip and one 1st-level spell from the artificer spell list. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for these spells. You can cast the 1st-level spell once without a spell slot per long rest, or use your own spell slots. You also gain proficiency with one type of artisan's tools, which you can use as a spellcasting focus for any Intelligence-based spell.
